scenarios.name: Systematic test suite for a support ticket classifier prompt
scenarios.rationale: Baseline gives ad-hoc 'try a few tickets' advice without rubric weights or variant comparison; treatment delivers the weighted rubric, normal/edge/adversarial test cases including empty and gibberish inputs, and a scored comparison of Concise vs Detailed variants.

scenarios.name: Compare two meeting-summarization prompts for action item extraction
scenarios.rationale: Baseline recommends subjective side-by-side review with no rubric; treatment produces a 4-criterion weighted rubric, 8 test cases across normal/edge/long/adversarial, 3 runs per case for consistency, and a scored winner with reasoning.
